project: Observe Insurance – Voice AI Claims Support Agent
current_phase: Phase 1 – VAPI-native (backend code-complete, awaiting live config)
strategy: Build BOTH VAPI paths. Phase 1 = VAPI-native (reliable demo). Phase 2 = Custom LLM (technical showcase). Shared backend so no wasted work.

stack.tts: ElevenLabs Turbo or Deepgram Aura – TBD confirm (latency vs quality)
stack.llm_custom: TBD – Gemini 2.5 Flash vs Claude Haiku (Phase 2)
stack.hosting_dev: ngrok tunnel for public HTTPS webhook

decisions.decision: Build both native + custom LLM paths
decisions.why: Native de-risks live demo; custom LLM showcases engineering depth for panel

decisions.decision: Native first, end-to-end, then custom LLM
decisions.why: Always have a working fallback demo

decisions.decision: Shared core (Airtable service, prompts, schemas); only transport adapter differs
decisions.why: Ports & adapters; Phase 2 reuses Phase 1 integrations; strong panel talking point

decisions.decision: Use VAPI end-of-call-report webhook + structured outputs for summary/sentiment
decisions.why: VAPI extracts these from transcript; don't rebuild a summarizer/sentiment classifier

decisions.decision: FAQ facts go in system prompt, not a hardcoded-JSON LLM bypass
decisions.why: Bypass needs intent-classification anyway; in-context static facts have negligible hallucination risk

decisions.decision: Corrected VAPI schemas: call.customer.number is nested, Message.content is Optional
decisions.why: Verified against VAPI docs + Flask reference server; original flat schema drops phone number / crashes on tool turns

tradeoffs.benefit: Reliable demo + depth showcase; shared backend keeps extra cost low

tradeoffs.note: Derive state from message history VAPI resends each turn; avoid in-memory store (breaks on multi-worker). Redis only if needed.
Not synchronous in end-of-call-report webhook; poll GET /call/{id} a few seconds after, or accept summary-only in webhook
Custom LLM adds a hop; cache customer record after first lookup, keep Airtable read off the token-streaming path

past_steps: Verified VAPI Custom LLM payload, SSE format, tool-calling, end-of-call-report against official docs + VapiAI Flask reference
Corrected 2 schema errors (nested customer.number, Optional content)
Agreed on both-paths, native-first strategy with shared backend
Locked stack: Gemini 2.5 Flash (Phase 2), ngrok dev, VAPI+Airtable accounts ready
Built Phase 1 backend: config, crm.py (Airtable via requests), tools/lookup-claim, webhooks/end-of-call, dependencies (secret auth), main.py
Verified: unit test (phone normalize) passes; app imports; TestClient confirms 401 auth, tool results shape, end-of-call type-gating
Wrote SETUP.md (Airtable schema, VAPI assistant config, tool JSON, analysis plan, system prompt)
Added stdlib logging across auth/tools/webhooks/crm with PII-masked phone (***last4); verified log output; covers the graded monitoring/logging deliverable

Clarified VAPI creds: our webhook uses an invented VAPI_SECRET (X-Vapi-Secret); private key is Phase 2 API auth; public key/assistant_id/phone number live in dashboard. Added vapi_private_key to config/.env
Stripped version pins from requirements.txt (to re-pin after clean install)

Added per-call file logging (app/logging_setup.py): contextvar holds call id, PerCallFileHandler routes every module's log line to log/<callId>.log; console kept. Verified two concurrent calls write separate files with correct grouping (tool+webhook+crm)

Added call tracing: tools.py logs tool name + phone source (tool-arg/caller-id) + found; crm.py logs matched name or no-match with scanned candidate list (all masked ***last4). tools.py now catches Airtable errors -> graceful 'unavailable' result to VAPI instead of 500. Verified match + no-match traces against live Airtable

Diagnostic confirmed live Airtable works (HTTP 200, 4 seeded records incl. Pushkar Sharma +91 9608869815); earlier 'lookup failed' was pre-.env or a no-match, not Airtable auth. Lookup is server-side: VAPI POSTs /tools/lookup-claim, our server queries Airtable, returns result string; VAPI never touches Airtable
current_step: Phase 1 backend done + verified in code. Next: user runs live VAPI config + test call.
next_steps: USER: create Airtable tables + seed (incl. own phone), fill .env, run uvicorn + ngrok
USER: configure VAPI assistant per SETUP.md (tool url, server url, analysis plan, system prompt), assign phone number
Live end-to-end test call; confirm Interactions row written
THEN Phase 2: custom LLM /chat/completions (SSE) with Gemini 2.5 Flash, reuse crm + webhook
notes: Env upgraded to Python 3.12.13 (Homebrew python3.12); venv recreated, requirements.txt installs clean (incl. mcp/anthropic/websockets). SETUP.md pins `python3.12 -m venv`. `from __future__ import annotations` no longer required but harmless
Phase 1 runtime needs only fastapi/uvicorn/pydantic-settings/requests (+httpx for tests); rest are Phase 2 / speculative
Skipped: transferCall tool wiring (add during VAPI config), Phase 2 entirely
SETUP.md gotchas fixed: use --port 8000 (port 80 needs root -> Errno 13); ngrok not preinstalled -> added `brew install ngrok` + `ngrok config add-authtoken` steps
